rings.note: Raised area to the north should form one continuous raised area that forms an upper eyelid curved shape following the top half circle of the city. From the raised area waterfalls fall to the basins floor and flow into the cannals circling the city

impact.note: Needs over time sequence, at least 3 frames comet, impact, aftermath.

westminster.note: The rest of the palace needs including, the two current towers are the north east tower (big ben)and south east tower (main entrance) with 3 inner courtyards and the western face onto the Thames with a dock along it's face, 3 tiers high and the upper two tiers are double height.  Surround the 3 court yards, there are 8 Towers in total (2 being Big Ben and Entrance) the 6 other towers are smaller

giza.note: Extend nile, lower Sphinx as it sits lower on the terrain on the globe. Temple at shoreline and course-way and perimeter wall need including

stepped-pyramid.note: Should be the same on each side, with a snake running down the staircase sides
